Properties.Name: Mergers & Acquisitions
Properties.Description: "Mergers & Acquisitions" in legal practice involves advising on corporate transactions where companies combine or one buys another. Lawyers negotiate terms, draft agreements, conduct due diligence, and navigate regulatory approvals to ensure deals are legally sound. This area focuses on maximizing value and minimizing risk for corporate clients in transactions.

Properties.Name: Corporate Governance
Properties.Description: Corporate Governance in legal practice ensures companies comply with laws, ethical standards, and internal policies. It focuses on board responsibilities, shareholder rights, transparency, and risk management to foster accountability and sustainability. Legal advisors guide firms on regulatory compliance, governance structures, and best practices for effective corporate management and stakeholder engagement.
